arrowParens.description: Include parentheses around a sole arrow function parameter.

bracketSameLine.description: Put the closing bracket of a multiline element on the last line.

bracketSpacing.description: Print spaces between brackets in object literals.

embeddedLanguageFormatting.description: Control formatting of quoted code embedded in a file.

experimentalOperatorPosition.description: Where to print operators when binary expressions wrap.

experimentalTernaries.description: Use the experimental curious ternary formatting.

htmlWhitespaceSensitivity.description: How to handle whitespace in HTML.

jsxSingleQuote.description: Use single quotes instead of double quotes in JSX.

objectWrap.description: How to wrap object literals when they could fit on one line.

printWidth.description: The line length at which Prettier tries to wrap.

proseWrap.description: How to wrap prose in supported files.

quoteProps.description: When to add quotes around object properties.

semi.description: Print semicolons at the ends of statements.

singleAttributePerLine.description: Enforce one attribute per line in HTML, Vue, and JSX.

singleQuote.description: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.

tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indentation level.

trailingComma.description: Where to print trailing commas wherever possible.

useTabs.description: Indent lines with tabs instead of spaces.

vueIndentScriptAndStyle.description: Indent script and style tags in Vue files.
